content.title: Disaster Golf
shortDescriptions: A spin on typical miniature golf video games. Use the forces of nature and a variety of natural disasters, from meteor strikes to black holes, to complete the course in the best possible time!
Created for IM 459 - Game Design Capstone to expand upon a pre-existing prototype.
longDescriptions: Are you tired of playing golf and having to evacuate when you're given a tornado warning? In Disaster Golf, disasters are here to help you play! Utilize lightning to zap the ball across the course at extraordinary speeds, meteors to shoot the ball high into the sky with explosive power, and strong gusts of wind to putt the golf ball closer and closer to the hole. Golf in different terrain, from the Jurassic era to modern cities and everything in between. The world is your golf course.

responsibilities.responsibilitiy: Hosted sprint retrospectives to discuss the most recent sprint.
nested: I made sure that the team knows these discussions are open for anyone to provide feedback.

responsibilities.responsibilitiy: Verified all work meets the discussed vision we have for the game.
Managed discipline leads and sub-team leads to make sure the team is not only contributing to the project's creative vision but learning along the way.
Frequently checked in with individual team members to ensure work is being completed as expected.
Verified all work meets the discussed vision we have for the game.
Notifies team members that any/all of their opinions are valid and will be taken into consideration.
nested: I want people to be excited to work on this project. I want them to take ownership of their work and feel like they are contributing to something amazing.

responsibilities.responsibilitiy: Makes sure the team is not only contributing to the project but learning along the way.
Overhauled project management when work was not getting completed.
nested: My efforts resulted in a steady flow of work being produced, increased communication between sub-teams, explicitly defined expectations for being a member of the project, a discipline lead, and a sub-team lead.

responsibilities.responsibilitiy: Created anonymous feedback form where the team can privately express concerns and considerations.
Created and managed our ClickUp page.

content.title: Speedrun Shopping
shortDescriptions: A game created given the theme of 'comedy', Speedrun Shopping is a frantic, fast-paced shopping simulator. Ram into other shoppers, steal items you need from them, and try to fill out your shopping list as quickly as you can!
Created for CIS 497 - Unity Design Patterns for practice working with design patterns on a large-scale project.
longDescriptions: Speedrun Shopping is a frantic, fast-paced shopping simulator. Sprint around the shopping center in search of the items on your shopping list, and ram into other shoppers to make them drop their items so you cansteal them for yourself. Once you have all of the items you need, check out and compete for a faster time. Speed is the name of the game!
Created for CIS 497 - Unity Design Patterns with the theme 'comedy' to practice implementing design patterns into larger projects with a team.

content.title: Shattered Shards
shortDescriptions: A rapidly developed prototype made in around four weeks. Explore an eerie, distorted, abandoned Catholic school for notes left by previous captives to figure out what happened and how you'll get out. Keep your eyes peeled for the monster lurking the halls.
Created for IM 488 - Capstone Prototyping to develop prototypes that may be expanded upon senior year.
